title: Daoeller
description: This mod adds a new mob “Daoeller” - a terrible creature that spawns at night and when killed, drops its “fang” from which you can brew a potion or make a blade. When using a blade, there is a chance that a bleeding effect will be applied.
body:
MOD IS REQUIRE A GECKOLIB!
This mod adds a new mob “Daoeller” - a terrible creature that spawns at night and when killed, drops its “fang” from which you can brew a potion or make a blade. When using a blade, there is a chance that a bleeding effect will be applied.

Author: daobin's studio ([discord](https://discord.gg/TZErBFv3BP))
